meaning: n.[生物]杂种v.异种交配,培育杂种,(使)杂交
examples: Unfortunately attempts to crossbreed it with other potatoes have been unsuccessful.
A Savannah cat is a crossbreed between a domestic cat and a medium-sized wild African cat called the Serval.
Why would anyone crossbreed a perfectly serviceable bear with an owl?
It was only after the police were called about a bad smell emanating from a property in Peckham, south London, that this little terrier crossbreed was rescued.
Also, languages can crossbreed in a way that species do not.
